summary: Regression testing of useCallback refactor on 5 pages (Appuntamenti, DocenteAlunni, DocenteMaterie, Eccezioni, Orari) after fix for CI=true Vercel build. All flows working identically. No infinite re-render loops, no react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in console.
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 refactored files correctly use useCallback with proper deps and useEffect([load]) pattern.
Appuntamenti.jsx load deps [selectedDocenteId, da, a] - correct (da/a derived from weekStart via useMemo->days).
DocenteAlunni.jsx and DocenteMaterie.jsx load deps [docenteId] - correct.
Note: one unrelated console error about <span> inside <option> from Emergent's dev instrumentation (x-file-name attrs) — pre-existing, not caused by this refactor.
test_credentials: admin@demo.it / Admin123! (from problem statement, verified working)
seed_data_creation: None; used existing seed docenti (Marco Bianchi, Sara Test30) and clienti.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor useCallback + [load] verified: (1) Appuntamenti — dropdown switch Marco Bianchi -> Sara Test30 triggers refetch, calendar re-renders with new slot_minuti (60->30). (2) Eccezioni — dropdown switch OK, lista si aggiorna. (3) Orari — Marco Bianchi mostra 10 blocchi orari, Sara Test30 ne mostra 5, confermando refetch al cambio docente. (4) DocenteAlunni — pagina carica 2 alunni; associa un cliente -> lista passa a 3; disassocia -> torna a 2 (load() richiamato dopo mutation). (5) DocenteMaterie — pagina carica 2 materie correttamente. Nessun warning React hook/dependency, nessun loop di rerender.
rca of the issue: Non applicabile: nessun bug rilevato dopo il refactor.
